visualizerParams.title: DFS Bridge/Articulation Point Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The articulation point discovery is failing to identify correctly the points that split the graph into separate components. There's a subtle bug in how back-edges are handled. Identify and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: The original code incorrectly used `low[v] > disc[u]` instead of `low[v] >= disc[u]` to identify articulation points. Also, when encountering a back-edge, the update should be `low[u] = min(low[u], disc[v])` to correctly account for the discovery time of the ancestor.
